title: Uller Uprising
description: Uller Uprising — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "Uller Uprising" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: ‘Table of Contents’
memes.description: ‘Table of Contents’

memes.label: Airjeep
memes.description: The Airjeep — a small contragravity military vehicle bristling with 15mm machine-guns and 50mm rocket tubes (001-004), used for reconnaissance and close air support, crewed by a lieutenant-driver and sergeant-gunner.

memes.label: Anti-Terran Sentiment
memes.description: Widespread political and social hostility among Ulleran populations toward Terran colonists and the Uller Company, channeled through religious movements, trade grievances, and nationalist politics.

memes.label: Assassination of Governor Harrington
memes.description: The assassination of Governor Sidney Harrington — poisoned by a geek servant at 22:10 local time on orders from Gurgurk and possibly Rakkeed (007-032), triggering von Schlichten's assumption of military command over the Company's defenses (006-039).

memes.label: barney-mordkovitz
memes.description: Brigadier-General Barney Mordkovitz, the Terran military commanding officer at Skilk, a black-bearded officer who commanded the Company's defense during the Night of the Uprising.

memes.label: Battle of Konkrook Reservation
memes.description: The Battle of Konkrook Reservation — siege of the Company compound by native mutineers and Ulleran irregular forces, involving contragravity air attacks repulsed at the wire perimeter (010-039), relieved by Kragan reinforcements airlifted by King Kankad (010-007)(010-015).

memes.label: Beta Hydrae
memes.description: The primary star of the Beta Hydrae system, around which Uller (Beta Hydrae II) orbits — the central celestial body in Ulleran cosmology and a key worldbuilding element of the novel's setting.

memes.label: Bombing of Keegark
memes.description: The nuclear bombing of Keegark — the Dire Dawn bomb dropped from the Elmoran cutter (015-011), killing approximately 150,000 Ullerans with three detonations (015-034), ending the uprising at von Schlichten's command (015-044).

memes.label: Bwork
memes.description: Bwork — city on the eastern shore of the Takkad Sea on Uller, site of a Company Residency and trading station that fell early in the Uprising, and the planned target for a demonstration nuclear bombardment.

memes.label: captain-malavez
memes.description: Captain Inez Malavez, the Terran woman officer commanding the Skilk telecast station, who served as a critical communications hub during the opening hours of the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: captain-pedolsky
memes.description: Captain Pedolsky, commander of the Kragan Rifles airjeep patrol that responded to the Konkrook riot and secured the scene of the assassination attempt on Governor-General Harrington.

memes.label: Carlos von Schlichten
memes.description: General Carlos von Schlichten — Governor-General of Uller, commander of Company forces during the uprising, wearer of a monocle and smoker of endless cigarettes. The novel's central Terran protagonist.

memes.label: colonel-cheng
memes.description: Colonel Cheng-Li, Terran Intelligence officer and Constabulary chief at Skilk, key source of tactical intelligence during the Company's defense against the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: colonel-jarman
memes.description: Colonel Jarman, Terran officer commanding the military airfield and contragravity forces at Skilk during the defense against the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Command-Car
memes.description: The Command-Car — von Schlichten's armored contragravity vehicle, using cold-jet rotors for lift and hot-jets for forward motion (001-015), equipped with a ball-turret twin 15mm gun system and serving as mobile command post during the uprising.

memes.label: commander-prinsloo
memes.description: Commander Dirk Prinsloo, captain of the Company spaceship *Aldebaran*, instrumental in the naval bombardment of Keegark and the search for Orgzild's nuclear-armed freighters during the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: commodore-hargreaves
memes.description: Air-Commodore Leslie Hargreaves, commander of Company air and space patrol forces during the nuclear phase of the Uller Uprising, architect of the aerial defense network against King Orgzild's atomic bomb.

memes.label: Company Economics
memes.description: The economic system of the Chartered Uller Company — nuclear-powered, trade-driven, and financially entangled with the Banking Cartel that shapes strategic decisions from 21 light-years away.

memes.label: Company Residency
memes.description: Fortified administrative outposts of the Uller Company located in every major Ulleran city, serving as combined governor's offices, military garrisons, trade stations, and symbols of Terran colonial authority.

memes.label: Company Rule
memes.description: The Chartered Uller Company's system of corporate governance on Uller — a privatized colonial administration that pursues profit while exercising sovereign powers.

memes.label: Contragravity
memes.description: Anti-gravity technology central to Terran transportation, warfare, and industrial operations on Uller and Niflheim.

memes.label: Contragravity Armor
memes.description: Contragravity Armor — egg-shaped powered exoskeletons designed for Niflheim's fluorine atmosphere (P02-004)(P02-010), featuring multiple arms and grab-hooks, operated more effectively by four-handed Nifl workers than by Terrans (004-026).

memes.label: Cross-Species Communication
memes.description: The technological and linguistic challenges of communication between Terrans and Ullerans — a physical impossibility without mechanical aids that shapes every interaction between the species.

memes.label: Eastern Shore
memes.description: The Eastern Shore of Uller — a coastal region east of Konkrook, home to the Free Cities including Kwurk, and territory contested between King Orgzild's forces and Company-allied Kragan factions during the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Eric Blount
memes.description: Eric Blount — Company Resident at Konkrook whose brutal death by the Keegarkan mob is cited as justification for the nuclear destruction of Keegark, representing the institutional racism of Company colonial administration.

memes.label: Fluorine-Based Life
memes.description: The alternative biochemistry of Niflheim's native lifeforms, based on fluorine chemistry instead of oxygen — a foundational concept of the novel's dual-world setting.

memes.label: Geek (Ulleran Slur)
memes.description: "Geek" is the dominant Terran derogatory term for Ullerans, used throughout the novel to reflect the casual racism underpinning Company-native relations on Uller.

memes.label: Geek-Speaker
memes.description: Colloquial name for the Ulleran enunciator, a prosthetic device enabling Terrans to pronounce the Ulleran language by replicating the saurian vocal apparatus.

memes.label: Gongonk Island
memes.description: Gongonk Island — Company headquarters island in Konkrook Channel, site of the main Terran military and administrative complex on Uller, power plant, and nuclear weapons laboratory.

memes.label: Governor-General
memes.description: The Uller Company's chief executive officer on Uller, holding combined civil, military, and diplomatic authority — effectively the planetary governor under the Terran Federation's colonial charter.

memes.label: grank
memes.description: Grank, a northern Ulleran kingdom ruled by King Yoorkerk, site of a crucial diplomatic mission by Hideyoshi O'Leary during the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: grinell
memes.description: Colonel Robert Grinell, Company Intelligence officer and former Terran Federation Regular Army officer who investigated the assassination of Governor-General Harrington and provided key intelligence on Prince Gorkrink's nuclear espionage.

memes.label: harry-quong
memes.description: Sergeant Harry Quong, Terran aircar driver and veteranCompany hand on Uller, frequent companion of von Schlichten's inner circle.

memes.label: hassan-bogdanoff
memes.description: Corporal Hassan Bogdanoff, Terran aircar gunner and veteran Company hand, ball-turret gunner during the Konkrook rescue and frequent companion of von Schlichten's inner circle.

memes.label: Ulleran Hermaphroditism
memes.description: The biological trait of functional hermaphroditism among Ullerans — all individuals share a single gender and can both bear and fertilize young, with profound implications for Ulleran society and military organization.

memes.label: hideyoshi-oleary
memes.description: Colonel Hideyoshi O'Leary, adjutant to General Carlos von Schlichten and one of the most trusted Terran officers in the Company's defense during the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Hoork River
memes.description: Hoork River — dry river valley running south from Skilk to Keegark on Uller, forming a major north-south transportation corridor and a key axis of military operations during the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Interstellar Travel
memes.description: Faster-than-light travel enabling the Terran Federation's interstellar civilization — and creating the six-month communication gap that forces colonial commanders to act without higher authorization.

memes.label: "Introduction"
memes.description: "Introduction to the 1952 Piper novel by John D. Clark, with scientific background on silicon-based and fluorine-based alien life"

memes.label: jaikark
memes.description: King Jaikark XVII, drug-addicted puppet monarch of Konkrook, propped up by Company subsidies and manipulated by his Prime Minister Gurgurk.

memes.label: juan-murillo
memes.description: Dr. Juan Murillo, Company seismologist on Niflheim, a third-generation Martian of Andes Indian ancestry who pioneered the A-bomb mining technique and whose assistant Gorkrink was later implicated as a spy for King Orgzild.

memes.label: jules-keaveney
memes.description: Jules Keaveney, Resident-Agent at Skilk for the Chartered Uller Company, whose dismissiveness of military concerns and later panic during the uprising exemplified the Company administration's unpreparedness.

memes.label: Kankad's Town
memes.description: Kankad's Town — the ancient Kragan capital-city on Uller, seat of King Kankad, situated on the landward edge of a swamp between Konkrook and Skilk, and the primary staging ground for Kragan military forces during the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Keegark
memes.description: Keegark — city of King Orgzild, center of the nuclear bomb conspiracy, destroyed by the Dire Dawn bomb with approximately 150,000 Ullerans killed.

memes.label: king-firkked
memes.description: King Firkked of Skilk, anti-Terran Ulleran monarch and key antagonist in the northern theater of the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: king-jonkvank
memes.description: King Jonkvank of Krink, pro-Terran Ulleran monarch who allied with von Schlichten during the uprising in exchange for political control of Skilk.

memes.label: King Kankad
memes.description: King Kankad — the Kragan king who is von Schlichten's most valuable native ally, providing the contragravity airlift that saves Konkrook and representing the Kragan people's integration into the Terran colonial order.

memes.label: king-yoorkerk
memes.description: King Yoorkerk, ruler of Grank, an opportunistic Ulleran monarch who tried to play both sides during the uprising before being coerced into supporting the Company.

memes.label: Kingdom of Kankad's Town
memes.description: The Kingdom of Kankad's Town — a Kragan kingdom ruled by King Kankad, possessing the only non-Terran artillery above 75mm on Uller (005-045), operating schools teaching Lingua Terra, and providing the critical contragravity airlift that saved the Konkrook Reservation.

memes.label: Kingdom of Keegark
memes.description: The Kingdom of Keegark — ruled by King Orgzild, center of the nuclear weapons conspiracy, host to ambassador who sheltered Rakkeed (002-019), destroyed by nuclear bombing in the uprising's final act.

memes.label: Kingdom of Konkrook
memes.description: The Kingdom of Konkrook — ruled by the Company puppet King Jaikark, undermined by his son Prince Gurgurk who conspired with Rakkeed against Company rule (002-010)(002-013), site of the main Company Reservation and the decisive siege of the uprising.

memes.label: Konk Isthmus
memes.description: The Konk Isthmus — the peninsula on which the city of Konkrook is situated, formed by the delta of the Konk River on Uller, bounded by Konkrook Channel and the surrounding sea.

memes.label: Konk Mountains
memes.description: The Konk Mountains (East Konk Mountains) — a mountain range east of Konkrook on Uller, forming a natural barrier between the Konkrook delta region and the interior, and serving as a visual landmark for air traffic approaching the city.

memes.label: Konk Valley
memes.description: Konk Valley — river valley running south toward Konkrook on Uller, site of the nuclear destruction of the captured Boer-class freighter Jan Smuts during the fleet action of the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Konkrook
memes.description: Konkrook — capital city of the Konk Isthmus, seat of King Jaikark the Company puppet, and site of the major uprising battle at the Company Reservation.

memes.label: kormork
memes.description: Native-Major Kormork, a Kragan officer in the Company's service, co-parent of young with King Kankad, and commander of the Kragan relief force that fought through to Company House during the Konkrook uprising.

memes.label: Kragan
memes.description: A mercenary tribe/subspecies of Ullerans — the most culturally advanced native group on Uller, distinguished by dark skin with amber speckles and a strategic alliance with the Company through the Kragan Rifles.

memes.label: Kragan Airlift (Operation Hildegarde Logistics)
memes.description: The improvised contragravity airlift of Kragan troops from Kankad's Town to Konkrook during the Uller uprising, a decisive logistical operation that shifted the military balance in favor of the Company.

memes.label: krink
memes.description: Krink, one of the northern Ulleran kingdoms ruled by King Jonkvank, a strategically critical pro-Company territory during the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Kwurk
memes.description: Kwurk — the northernmost of the Eastern Shore Free Cities on Uller, site of a small Company Residency, whose garrison evacuated to Kankad's Town during the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Lingua Terra
memes.description: The hybrid common language of Sixth Century humanity — an English-Spanish-Afrikaans-Portuguese creole used for cross-cultural communication on Uller.

memes.label: lord-ghroghrank
memes.description: Lord Ghroghrank, Keegarkan Ambassador to the court of King Jaikark of Konkrook, envoy of King Orgzild who facilitated the nuclear plutonium transfer and relayed the order for Governor-General Harrington's assassination.

memes.label: lourenco-gomes
memes.description: Dr. Lourenço Gomes, Company nuclear engineer who pioneered the A-bomb mining technique on Niflheim and whose death during the first hour of the Konkrook uprising deprived the Terrans of their only bomb-design expert.

memes.label: major-falkenberg
memes.description: Major Falkenberg, commander of the Eighteenth Rifles, who led the recapture of the native-troops barracks and labor camp during the Skilk siege, and later served as von Schlichten's adjutant after Paula Quinton was relieved.

memes.label: mohammed-ferriera
memes.description: Mohammed Ferriera, Terran field agent for the Extraterrestrials' Rights Association and longtime colonist on Uller, seriously injured during the Konkrook mob attack that opened the novel.

memes.label: Native Labor System
memes.description: The Chartered Uller Company's system of indigenous labor — its economic logic, its reliance on native foremen, and the abuses that fuel political opposition and the uprising.

memes.label: Niflheim
memes.description: Niflheim — the fluorine-atmosphere companion planet of the Beta Hydri system, site of nuclear mining operations whose security failure enabled the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Nuclear Weapons on Uller
memes.description: Nuclear armament and its role in the Uller Uprising — from mining tools to weapons of mass destruction.

memes.label: Operation Hildegarde
memes.description: Operation Hildegarde — the Company's emergency nuclear weapons project, in which engineers reverse-engineered fission bomb designs from a historical romance novel (014-027)(014-030), separating "the nuclear physics from the pornography" (014-038), and assembled working devices in a liquid-oxygen tank (014-065).

memes.label: Paula Quinton
memes.description: Paula Quinton — sent to Uller to investigate labor conditions for the Extraterrestrials' Rights Association, she becomes von Schlichten's trusted aide, romantic interest, and a key figure in the Terran defense.

memes.label: Planetary Engineering
memes.description: Large-scale modification of planetary environments — particularly nuclear mining on Niflheim — demonstrating the Terran Federation's technological reach and its security vulnerabilities.

memes.label: "Prologue"
memes.description: "Prologue — On Satan's Footstool: the first landing on Niflheim"

memes.label: Psionic Phenomenon
memes.description: The quasi-religious psionic phenomenon exploited by the caravan-preacher Rakkeed to mobilize native Ullerans against the Company — a blend of mass psychology, alien mental abilities, and political radicalization.

memes.label: Shellosaur (Ulleran Megafauna)
memes.description: Massive silicate-armored creatures, ranging from five to fifteen tons, that were the dominant mobile land-life on prehistoric Uller and a primary evolutionary pressure driving the divergence of proto-Ulleran populations.

memes.label: Sid Harrington
memes.description: Sid Harrington — Governor-General of the Chartered Uller Company who is assassinated by poison, triggering von Schlichten's assumption of command during the early stages of the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Silicon-Based Life
memes.description: The alternative biochemistry of Uller's native lifeforms — silicone-based organisms in a low-oxygen, high-temperature environment.

memes.label: Skilk
memes.description: Skilk — city of King Firkked, site of von Schlichten's command post during the uprising, where the telecast station served as headquarters for planetary military operations.

memes.label: Spaceport (Uller Spaceport Infrastructure)
memes.description: Spaceports on Uller served as both interstellar transit hubs and strategic military assets, with the proposed Keegark spaceport becoming a central political lever in the lead-up to the Uller uprising.

memes.label: Spear of State (Konkrookan Royal Regalia)
memes.description: A ceremonial weapon carried before the King of Konkrook as the proxy-presence of the monarch, the Spear of State was the most potent symbol of Ulleran royal authority — and the ultimate trophy of conquest.

memes.label: Takkad Sea
memes.description: Takkad Sea — inland sea in the equatorial zone of Uller, surrounded by major kingdoms and Free Cities, forming a strategic corridor and cultural-linguistic region central to Company operations during the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Telecast Communications
memes.description: Long-range video communication system critical to Terran command, control, and battlefield awareness during the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Terran Federation
memes.description: The interstellar human government that claims sovereignty over Uller and Niflheim — the ultimate political authority behind the Chartered Uller Company.

memes.label: Terran Military Doctrine
memes.description: The military doctrine governing Terran colonial forces on Uller — reliance on native mercenaries, avoidance of nuclear weapons, and the tactical innovations forced by the uprising.

memes.label: Uller
memes.description: Uller — the second planet of Beta Hydri, 21 light-years from Earth, home to a silicon-based intelligent species and the primary setting of the Uller Uprising.

memes.label: Uller Uprising
memes.description: The Uller Uprising — a coordinated native rebellion across multiple kingdoms, triggered by Rakkeed's psionic movement and Orgzild's nuclear conspiracy, beginning with Harrington's assassination (006-039) and the Konkrook mutiny (008-011), culminating in the nuclear destruction of Keegark (015-043).

memes.label: Ulleran
memes.description: Silicon-based humanoid species native to the planet Uller. Physically distinct with four arms, four-foot stature, and hermaphroditic reproduction. The dominant intelligent lifeform of the Beta Hydri system.

memes.label: Ulleran Addiction
memes.description: The widespread addiction to a native narcotic drug among Ulleran nobility — a cultural phenomenon with profound political consequences for the Konkrook court.

memes.label: Ulleran Biology
memes.description: The silicone-based biology of the native Ulleran species — physiology, metabolism, and reproductive characteristics

memes.label: Ulleran Modesty Taboos
memes.description: The Ulleran cultural norms around modesty and sex that create persistent misunderstanding between Terrans and natives — a window into the deeper incommensurability of the two species' social worlds.
